item.title: Claude Fable 5 官宣永久可用
item.guid: Claude-Fable-5-官宣永久可用
item.description: Claude announced that starting July 20th, Fable 5 will remain in all Max and Team Premium plans with a 50% quota. Pro and Team Standard users will continue to access it with points, and users will also receive a one-time credit of $100. Claude 宣布当时时间 7 月 20 日起，Fable 5 继续留在所有 Max 和 Team Premium 套餐里，限额 50%。Pro 和 Team Standard 用户继续用积分访问，另外给用户发 100 美元的一次性积分。

item.title: Meta 与 Anthropic 商谈两年最高 100 亿美元算力租赁
item.guid: Meta-与-Anthropic-商谈两年最高-100-亿美元算力租赁
item.description:
According to The New York Times, Meta is in talks with Anthropic to lease data center computing power, with a potential two-year contract worth up to $10 billion. Anthropic proposed the cooperation plan in June, Meta is still evaluating it, and both parties have not yet signed a final agreement. 据《纽约时报》报道，Meta 正与 Anthropic 商谈出租数据中心算力，潜在合同两年最高价值 100 亿美元。Anthropic 在 6 月提出合作方案，Meta 仍在评估，双方尚未签署最终协议。

Meta's capital expenditure plan for this year could reach up to $145 billion. CEO Mark Zuckerberg previously stated that if the company's own AI business does not exhaust the newly added computing power, the company can sell the remaining capacity externally. Anthropic, on the other hand, continues to procure computing resources due to the growing demand for Claude Code, while also hiring former Google executives to advance the construction of its own data centers. Meta 今年资本开支计划最高达到 1450 亿美元，CEO 扎克伯格此前表示，若自有 AI 业务没有耗尽新增算力，公司可以对外出售剩余容量。Anthropic 则因 Claude Code 需求增长继续采购计算资源，同时聘请前 Google 高管推进自建数据中心。

Anthropic has signed a long-term computing power agreement worth $45 billion with SpaceXAI, and these talks are for supplementing recent capacity. Meta, on the other hand, may be receiving its first large-scale external computing power revenue; the company still needs to allocate data center resources between its own model training, paid AI subscriptions, and external leasing. Anthropic 已与 SpaceXAI 签署价值 450 亿美元的长期算力协议，本次商谈用于补充近期容量。Meta 获得的则可能是首次大规模外部算力收入；公司仍需在自有模型训练、付费 AI 订阅和对外出租之间安排数据中心资源。

item.title: OpenAI 战略未来负责人：Kimi K3 性能接近 2026 年第一季度最佳公开模型
item.guid: OpenAI-战略未来负责人：Kimi-K3-性能接近-2026-年第一季度最佳公开模型
item.description:
Yesterday, Dean Ball, Head of Strategic Futures at OpenAI, posted that Kimi K3 is a "very good model" and its performance cannot be simply attributed to distillation. 昨天，OpenAI 战略未来负责人 Dean Ball 发文表示，Kimi K3 是一款「非常好的模型」，其表现不能简单归因于蒸馏。

In agent programming scenarios, Kimi K3 has essentially reached the level of the best public models in Q1 2026; however, according to his user experience, the model consumes a large number of tokens, so the actual operating cost may not be very low. 在智能体编程场景中，Kimi K3 基本达到 2026 年第一季度最佳公开模型的水平；不过，根据他的使用体验，该模型消耗的 token 较多，因此实际运行成本未必很低。

Ball also expressed surprise that China still allows the open availability of such high-capability models. He believes that this decision may be related to China's strategic judgment on AI, insufficient inference computing power, and the promotion of model exports; for Chinese companies, open models may also be a choice to catch up with leaders and expand influence. Ball 还表示，自己对中国仍允许开放这类高能力模型感到意外。他认为，相关决定可能与中国对 AI 的战略判断、推理算力不足，以及推动模型出口等因素有关；对于中国企业而言，开放模型也可能是追赶领先者、扩大影响力的选择。

item.title: 算力承压，Kimi 暂停 C 端新用户订阅
item.guid: 算力承压，Kimi-暂停-C-端新用户订阅
item.description:
Kimi announced on July 19th that due to user request volume significantly exceeding expectations within 48 hours after the K3 release and approaching the existing cluster's capacity limit, the company is suspending new consumer user subscriptions effective immediately. Kimi 于 7 月 19 日发布公告称，因 K3 发布后用户请求量在 48 小时内大幅超出预期，并逼近现有集群承载极限，公司即日起暂停 C 端新用户订阅。

Kimi stated that existing computing power will be prioritized to ensure the user experience of subscribed users, while also continuing to expand computing power; once new computing power is gradually in place, more subscription slots will be progressively opened until normal subscriptions resume. Kimi 表示，现有算力将优先用于保障已订阅用户的使用体验，同时继续推进算力扩容；待新算力陆续到位后，将逐步开放更多订阅名额，直至恢复正常订阅。

According to a report from the STAR Market Daily, Moonshot AI has sent a listing proposal to investors, and is expected to complete its Hong Kong stock market listing within the next 6 months at the earliest. 另据科创板日报报道，月之暗面已向投资人发送上市议案，预计最快 6 个月内有望完成港股上市。

Regarding the membership system, Moonshot AI will split general benefits such as Kimi Web, Kimi App, and Kimi Work from Kimi Code programming capabilities into two separate subscriptions. Users who need to use both types of features simultaneously will need to purchase a combination of general membership and a Coding Plan in the future; existing old plans can continue to be used and automatically renewed, and will not be forced to migrate. 在会员体系方面，月之暗面将 Kimi Web、Kimi App、Kimi Work 等通用权益与 Kimi Code 编程能力拆分为两套订阅。需要同时使用两类功能的用户，今后需要组合购买通用会员和 Coding Plan；现有旧套餐可继续使用并自动续订，不会被强制迁移。

Calculated at the annual payment price, the old Andante plan was 468 yuan, including general benefits and basic Code quota. Under the new system, the lowest combination is Go plus Starter, totaling 1536 yuan, an increase of approximately 228% compared to the old plan. 按年付价格计算，旧 Andante 套餐为 468 元，包含通用权益和基础 Code 额度。新体系下，最低组合为 Go 加 Starter，合计 1536 元，较旧套餐上涨约 228%。

When only using programming features, the Starter plan price is still 99 yuan per month; users who need high-speed models and up to 1 million context will need to choose Explorer, with a monthly fee of 299 yuan. 仅使用编程功能时，Starter 套餐价格仍为每月 99 元；需要高速模型和最高 100 万上下文的用户，则需选择 Explorer，月费为 299 元。

item.title: 马斯克称 2 万亿参数模型或超越 Kimi，下周完成初始训练
item.guid: 马斯克称-2-万亿参数模型或超越-Kimi，下周完成初始训练
item.description:
Elon Musk recently posted that his team is training a model with 2 trillion parameters, whose overall capabilities may surpass Kimi's, while aiming to be as close as possible to Grok 4.5's speed and token efficiency. 埃隆·马斯克日前发文表示，其团队正在训练一款参数规模为 2 万亿的模型，综合能力可能超过 Kimi，同时将尽量接近 Grok 4.5 的速度和 Token 效率。

Musk stated that this 2 trillion-parameter model is superior to the 1.5 trillion-parameter model "in all aspects" and is expected to complete initial training next week. 马斯克表示，这款 2 万亿参数模型「在各方面」都优于 1.5 万亿参数的模型，预计于下周完成初始训练。

Previously, Musk had rated Grok 4.5 as "possibly first" in terms of speed and cost. Related posts stated that Grok 4.5 has 1.5 trillion parameters, while Kimi K3 has 2.8 trillion, but the latter's cost per task is about 3 times that of the former. 此前，马斯克曾评价 Grok 4.5 在速度和成本方面「可能是第一」。相关帖文称，Grok 4.5 的参数规模为 1.5 万亿，而 Kimi K3 为 2.8 万亿，但后者每项任务的成本约为前者的 3 倍。

item.title: IDC 预计 2030 年全球活跃智能体将超过 22 亿个
item.guid: IDC-预计-2030-年全球活跃智能体将超过-22-亿个
item.description:
IDC pre-released the "DAA Research Report" at WAIC 2026, using Daily Active Agents to measure agents that actually enter business processes, complete tasks, and generate results each day. IDC 在 WAIC 2026 预发布《DAA 研究报告》，用 Daily Active Agents（日活智能体数）衡量每天实际进入业务流程、完成任务并产生结果的智能体。

The report predicts that the number of active agents globally will increase from 28.6 million in 2025 to 79.4 million in 2026, and reach 2.216 billion in 2030. 报告预计，全球活跃 Agent 数量将从 2025 年的 2860 万个增至 2026 年的 7940 万个，并在 2030 年达到 22.16 亿个。

The DAA metric was proposed by Baidu founder Robin Li at the Create 2026 conference, distinguishing itself from model parameters and token consumption by focusing on the actual usage of agents. Baidu also disclosed that the daily average number of questions for the general-purpose agent "Baidu Dazi" has increased 20-fold since its launch; Wenku Wangpan GenFlow's monthly active users have reached 100 million. DAA 指标由百度创始人李彦宏在 Create 2026 大会上提出，区别于模型参数和 Token 消耗，重点统计智能体的实际使用。百度同时披露，通用智能体「百度搭子」日均提问次数自上线以来增长 20 倍；文库网盘 GenFlow 月活用户达到 1 亿。

Baidu also released several application data points: As of July, applications generated by the no-code development tool "Miaoda" have cumulatively served over 35 million users and produced 3.5 million applications; the digital store manager "Baidu Yijian" covers four scenarios: food safety, service compliance, supply, sales, and inventory, and product quality, reducing the rate of kitchen violations in partner stores by 80%. 百度还公布了多项应用数据：截至 7 月，无代码开发工具秒哒生成的应用累计服务超过 3500 万用户，产生 350 万个应用；数字店长「百度一见」覆盖食品安全、服务合规、供销存和出品品质四类场景，合作门店的后厨违规操作率降低 80%。

item.title: 商汤发起「银河计划」，年内启动算力卫星组网验证
item.guid: 商汤发起「银河计划」，年内启动算力卫星组网验证
item.description:
SenseTime recently unveiled its overall layout for domestic AI infrastructure at WAIC 2026 and launched the 'Galaxy Plan' in collaboration with nearly 20 chip, server, and infrastructure partners. The plan includes building 1 Token operation center and 5 domestic intelligent computing clusters with ten thousand cards each, integrating chips, clusters, and model services from different manufacturers into a unified operation system. 商汤科技近日在 WAIC 2026 发布国产 AI 基础设施整体布局，并联合近 20 家芯片、服务器与基础设施伙伴发起「银河计划」。计划包括建设 1 个 Token 运营中心和 5 个万卡级国产智算集群，把不同厂商的芯片、集群和模型服务纳入统一运营体系。

SenseTime also collaborated with Guoxing Yuhang to build the 'SenseTime Space Computing Constellation'. Both parties plan to complete the launch of the first batch of 'SenseTime' computing satellites and initiate network verification this year, and establish a star-ground hybrid cloud commercial computing backbone network by 2028; by 2030, the constellation scale will reach thousands of satellites, with a total computing power exceeding 10,000 P. 商汤同时与国星宇航共建「商汤太空算力星座」。双方计划今年完成首批「商汤号」算力卫星发射并启动组网验证，2028 年建成星地混合云商用算力骨干网；到 2030 年，星座规模将达到千颗级，总算力超过万 P。

The accompanying ten-thousand-card-level space-ground integrated scheduling platform will connect ground intelligent computing centers and in-orbit computing nodes. SenseTime also plans to uniformly meter inference services provided by different domestic chips through the Token operation center, and integrate model adaptation, resource scheduling, and commercial delivery into the same infrastructure system. 配套的万卡级天地一体化调度平台将连接地面智算中心和在轨算力节点。商汤还计划通过 Token 运营中心统一计量不同国产芯片提供的推理服务，并把模型适配、资源调度和商业交付放入同一套基础设施体系。

item.title: 阶跃星辰与上海期智研究院共建智能体前沿研究院
item.guid: 阶跃星辰与上海期智研究院共建智能体前沿研究院
item.description:
On July 18, StepStar and Shanghai Qi Zhi Institute announced a collaboration to jointly establish an Advanced Institute for Intelligent Agents. They will conduct joint research focusing on intelligent agent networks and economic principles, AI Safety, and other areas, exploring fundamental theories, core technologies, standard systems, and industrial paradigms for the era of intelligent agents. 7 月 18 日，阶跃星辰与上海期智研究院宣布达成合作，双方将共同设立智能体前沿研究院，围绕智能体网络及经济原理、AI Safety 等方向开展联合研究，探索智能体时代的基础理论、核心技术、标准体系与产业范式。

Yao Qizhi, Dean of Shanghai Qi Zhi Institute, and Yin Qi, Chairman of StepStar and Chairman of Qianli Technology, attended the unveiling ceremony. During the ceremony, both parties proposed 'Five Major Global New Propositions for the Era of Intelligent Agents,' covering five aspects: rights of action, order of responsibility, safety paradigms, economic foundations, and human-machine symbiosis, discussing fundamental issues that may arise when intelligent agents widely enter the real world. 上海期智研究院院长姚期智与阶跃星辰董事长、千里科技董事长印奇出席揭牌仪式。双方在仪式上提出「智能体时代五大全球新命题」，涉及行动权利、责任秩序、安全范式、经济基础和人机共生五个方面，讨论智能体大规模进入真实世界后可能带来的基础性问题。

StepStar stated that this collaboration will strengthen synergistic innovation between academia and industry, promoting the transformation of cutting-edge research findings in intelligent agents into industrial practice. Concurrently, StepStar launched the StepStar Top Talent Program, recruiting intelligent agent talent globally to support researchers in conducting long-term studies on relevant frontier issues. 阶跃星辰表示，此次合作将加强学术界与产业界之间的协同创新，推动智能体前沿研究成果转化为产业实践。与此同时，阶跃星辰推出 StepStar 顶尖人才计划，面向全球招募智能体领域人才，支持研究者围绕相关前沿问题开展长期研究。

item.title: 长鑫科技 IPO 中签号出炉：网上中签率约 0.4714%
item.guid: 长鑫科技-IPO-中签号出炉：网上中签率约-0.4714%
item.description:
ChangXin Technology yesterday announced the online lottery results for its initial public offering on the STAR Market, generating a total of 7,702,207 winning numbers, each eligible to subscribe for 500 A-shares. The issuer and joint lead underwriters completed the lottery draw on July 17, and the process and results were notarized by the Shanghai Oriental Notary Public Office. 长鑫科技昨天公布科创板首次公开发行网上中签结果，共产生 7702207 个中签号码，每个号码可认购 500 股 A 股股票。发行人与联席主承销商已于 7 月 17 日完成摇号，过程及结果经上海市东方公证处公证。

The offering price for this issuance is 8.66 yuan per share. The number of valid online subscription accounts was 9,428,778, with valid subscription shares totaling 816.92 billion shares. After the clawback mechanism was activated, the final online offering quantity was 3.8511035 billion shares, and the final winning rate was 0.47141739%. 本次发行价格为每股 8.66 元，网上发行有效申购户数为 9428778 户，有效申购股数为 8169.20 亿股。回拨机制启动后，网上最终发行数量为 385110.35 万股，最终中签率为 0.47141739%。

item.title: 💡 作家 Dave Eggers：学生用 ChatGPT，将永远学不会写作
item.guid: 💡-作家-Dave-Eggers：学生用-ChatGPT，将永远学不会写作
item.description:
According to the Financial Times, writer Dave Eggers, invited by Sam Altman last year, criticized ChatGPT during a speech to about 200 OpenAI employees, stating that it is increasing the burden on educators and may cause students to lose the opportunity to learn writing and express personal opinions. 据《金融时报》披露，作家 Dave Eggers 去年受 Sam Altman 邀请，在 OpenAI 面向约 200 名员工发表演讲时，批评 ChatGPT 正在加重教育工作者的负担，并可能让学生失去学习写作和表达个人观点的机会。

Eggers stated that the impact of generative AI on teachers' work 'is catastrophic'. Eggers 表示，生成式 AI 对教师工作的影响「是灾难性的」。

If students use it to write, it's the most tragic thing; they will never learn to write. Their voices are also taken away. They will never have the ability to speak their truth or tell their own stories. This is silencing a generation or two.

Reportedly, Eggers' speech stemmed from Sam Altman's previous affirmation of AI-generated fiction. Altman had stated that he was impressed by a short story generated by ChatGPT; Eggers, however, called such works 'mimetic collage gibberish' and questioned whether anyone would truly want to read AI-created novels in the future. 据报道，Eggers 此次演讲源于 Sam Altman 此前对 AI 生成小说的肯定。Altman 曾表示，自己对 ChatGPT 生成的一篇短篇小说印象深刻；Eggers 则将这类作品称为「模仿性拼贴的胡言乱语」，并质疑未来是否真的会有人愿意阅读由 AI 创作的小说。

This is not the first time Eggers has criticized the tech industry. In his novel 'The Circle,' he depicted scenarios where large tech companies erode personal privacy and independence through surveillance and data collection; in his new work 'Contrapposto,' he further emphasized the importance of mastering creative skills through practice, teaching, and repeated revision. 这并不是 Eggers 第一次批评科技行业。他在小说《The Circle》中描绘了大型科技公司通过监控和数据收集侵蚀个人隐私与独立性的场景；在新作《Contrapposto》中，他进一步强调了通过练习、教学和反复修改来掌握创作技艺的重要性。

Facing the rapid proliferation of generative AI, Eggers believes that technology is often adopted on a large scale before society has fully judged its value. 面对生成式 AI 的快速普及，Eggers 认为，技术往往在社会充分判断其价值之前就被大规模采用。

item.title: 小米解释澎程增程车采用 76kWh 电池：日常尽量不启动增程器
item.guid: 小米解释澎程增程车采用-76kWh-电池：日常尽量不启动增程器
item.description:
Xiaomi Auto recently explained in its 261st 'Q&A with Netizens' that the Pengcheng series uses a maximum 76kWh battery to allow range-extended vehicles to maintain pure electric driving in most daily scenarios. The series has a maximum WLTC pure electric range of 380km and a maximum CLTC pure electric range of 505km. 小米汽车近日在第 261 集「答网友问」中解释，澎程系列采用最高 76kWh 电池，是为了让增程车在多数日常场景里维持纯电行驶。该系列 WLTC 纯电续航最高 380km，CLTC 纯电续航最高 505km。

Xiaomi stated that with lower speeds and more traffic lights in urban commuting, the actual range will be closer to CLTC conditions, and the 505km version can cover about a week of daily travel. The large battery also means users don't have to start the range extender early to preserve power; driving habits, ambient temperature, and air conditioning use will still affect the actual mileage. 小米称，城市通勤车速较低、红绿灯较多，实际续航会更接近 CLTC 工况，最高 505km 的版本可覆盖约一周日常出行。大电池也让用户不必为保留电量而提前启动增程器；驾驶习惯、环境温度和空调使用仍会改变实际里程。

The company summarizes this product philosophy as 'long-range pure electric': the range-extender system is primarily used to extend the pure electric experience during intercity and long-distance travel, rather than frequently intervening in short-distance commutes. 公司把这套产品思路概括为「纯电长续航」：增程系统主要用于跨城和长途时延续纯电体验，而不是在短距离通勤中频繁介入。

item.title: 荣耀 Robot Phone 开启预约，支持跨应用任务与云台互动
item.guid: 荣耀-Robot-Phone-开启预约，支持跨应用任务与云台互动
item.description:
On July 18, Honor CEO Li Jian stated at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC 2026) that AI will further evolve from a tool into a partner-type intelligent system with perception, reasoning, execution, and feedback capabilities. On the same day, the Honor Robot Phone opened for pre-orders across all channels, launching in 'Moon Shadow Gray' and 'Star Orbit Silver' colors. 7 月 18 日，荣耀 CEO 李健在 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC 2026）上表示，人工智能将从工具属性进一步发展为具备感知、推理、执行和反馈能力的伙伴型智能系统。同日，荣耀 Robot Phone 开启全渠道预约，推出「月影灰」和「星轨银」两款配色。

Honor stated that the Robot Phone is equipped with its next-generation terminal operating system, Agentic OS, which supports understanding complex instructions and automatically completing continuous tasks across applications. The product can also recognize user movements, respond interactively by rotating its gimbal, and perform dance moves based on sound. 荣耀表示，Robot Phone 搭载其下一代终端操作系统 Agentic OS，支持理解复杂指令，并自动完成跨应用的连续任务。产品还能够识别用户动作，通过转动云台进行互动回应，并根据声音做出舞蹈动作。

Honor stated that this marks its exploration and implementation of 'partner-type humanoid life forms' and embodied interaction, also signifying the product's evolution from an 'intelligent agent phone' to a 'robot phone' form. 荣耀称，这是其对「伙伴型类人生命体」以及具身交互方向的探索落地，也标志着产品从「智能体手机」向「机器人手机」形态延伸。

item.title: 曝 Flip8 将成三星最后一代小折叠
item.guid: 曝-Flip8-将成三星最后一代小折叠
item.description:
According to Korean media DealSite, Samsung Electronics' MX (Mobile eXperience) division is responding to cost pressure from rising memory chip prices and plans to rearrange its foldable product line. The Galaxy Z Flip8 will use Qualcomm chips in the Chinese and US markets, while versions for European and other markets will adopt Exynos 2600. 据韩媒 DealSite 报道，三星电子 MX（移动体验）事业部正应对存储芯片涨价带来的成本压力，计划重新安排折叠屏产品线。Galaxy Z Flip8 在中国和美国市场将使用高通芯片，欧洲等市场版本采用 Exynos 2600。

The report also stated that the Flip8 might be Samsung's last generation of small foldable products, with subsequent resources focusing on the Galaxy Z Fold8 and Fold8 Ultra. Samsung is also advancing the Galaxy Z Slide rollable screen phone, with mass production challenges including the flatness and display consistency after repeated panel retraction and extension, as well as balancing the roller structure, thickness, and weight. 报道还称，Flip8 可能成为三星最后一代小折叠产品，后续资源将集中到 Galaxy Z Fold8 与 Fold8 Ultra。三星同时推进 Galaxy Z Slide 卷轴屏手机，量产难点包括面板反复收放后的平整度、显示一致性，以及滚轴结构、厚度与重量的平衡。

Samsung Electronics' preliminary second-quarter results show the group's operating profit reached a new quarterly high, but market estimates for the MX division range from a profit of 1.9 trillion Korean won to a loss of 1.5 trillion Korean won. 三星电子第二季度初步业绩显示集团营业利润创季度新高，但市场对 MX 事业部的估算从盈利 1.9 万亿韩元到亏损 1.5 万亿韩元不等。

item.title: 首款接入腾讯 WorkBuddy 的 AI 眼镜发布
item.guid: 首款接入腾讯-WorkBuddy-的-AI-眼镜发布
item.description:
Tencent WorkBuddy and Liweike Technology unveiled X-AI Memory Glasses at WAIC 2026. The glasses are equipped with WakeeMemory OS, which can continuously record meeting discussions, business visits, and travel itineraries, then extract meeting resolutions, to-do items, and collaboration milestones, and synchronize the organized results for WorkBuddy to execute. 腾讯 WorkBuddy 与李未可科技在 WAIC 2026 发布 X-AI 记忆眼镜。眼镜搭载 WakeeMemory OS，可持续记录会议讨论、商务拜访和差旅行程，再提炼会议决议、待办事项与合作节点，并把整理结果同步给 WorkBuddy 执行。

The system organizes long-term records into working memories that include relationships, timelines, task priorities, and context, then hands over action items to WorkBuddy, rather than treating each voice input as an isolated command. Users can select a set of to-dos on the glasses and view WorkBuddy's execution progress and generated files. 系统会把长期记录组织成包含人物关系、时间节点、任务优先级和上下文的工作记忆，再将行动项交给 WorkBuddy，而不只把每次语音当作孤立指令。用户可以在眼镜端选择一组待办，查看 WorkBuddy 的执行进度与生成文件。

This product is the first smart glasses hardware launched after Tencent Cloud released the Buddy AI Co-creation Ecosystem Plan on June 5th. Both parties position the glasses as WorkBuddy's entry point to connect with real-world work scenarios, focusing on meeting recording, minute organization, and subsequent task execution. 这款产品是腾讯云 6 月 5 日发布 Buddy AI 共创生态计划后落地的首款智能眼镜硬件。双方把眼镜作为 WorkBuddy 连接现实工作场景的入口，重点覆盖会议记录、纪要整理和后续任务执行。

Meanwhile, Tencent WorkBuddy released its mobile application, with iOS, Android, and HarmonyOS versions launched simultaneously. The mobile client retains most of the desktop version's capabilities and can remotely connect to a local computer: after a user issues a task on their phone, the computer client calls local files and full desktop capabilities to continue execution. 与此同时，腾讯 WorkBuddy 发布移动应用，iOS、Android 和鸿蒙三个版本同步上线。移动端保留桌面版的大部分能力，并能远程连接本地电脑：用户在手机上发出任务后，由电脑端调用本地文件和完整桌面能力继续执行。

item.title: Qwen3.8 即将发布并开源，参数规模达 2.4T
item.guid: Qwen3.8-即将发布并开源，参数规模达-2.4T
item.description:
Alibaba Cloud's Qwen announced yesterday that Qwen3.8 is about to be released and open-sourced. The model has a parameter scale of 2.4T, and the official statement claims it "might be the most powerful model besides Fable 5." 阿里千问昨日宣布，Qwen3.8 即将发布并开源。该模型参数规模为 2.4T，官方表示其「可能是除了 Fable 5 外最强大的模型」。

Concurrently, the Qwen3.8-Max preview version has been launched on Alibaba Token Plan, Qoder, and QoderWork, allowing users to experience it through these platforms. 与此同时，Qwen3.8-Max 预览版已上线阿里 Token Plan、Qoder 及 QoderWork，用户可通过相关平台进行体验。

item.title: 面壁开源 MiniCPM-Robot 操作与跟踪模型
item.guid: 面壁开源-MiniCPM-Robot-操作与跟踪模型
item.description:
Yesterday, ModelBest and OpenBMB released and open-sourced the MiniCPM-Robot series at WAIC 2026, including MiniCPM-RobotManip for robot manipulation, and MiniCPM-RobotTrack, developed in collaboration with Nanjing University for mobile robot tracking and navigation. 昨天， 面壁智能与 OpenBMB 在 WAIC 2026 发布并开源 MiniCPM-Robot 系列，包括面向机器人操作的 MiniCPM-RobotManip，以及与南京大学合作开发、面向移动机器人跟踪导航的 MiniCPM-RobotTrack。

    MiniCPM-RobotManip is a 1.5B parameter general VLA model, supporting 1 minute of contextual memory. In manipulation tasks involving 60 frames of historical observations, streaming inference reduces the single-step computation from 125 TFLOPs during re-computation to 3.3 TFLOPs; with H100 and BF16 precision, the single decision step latency is 120ms.

    MiniCPM-RobotTrack is a 0.9B pure visual instruction tracking model, natively adapted for Unitree Go2 Edu, using only the original camera and local computing power to complete single-target, dynamic multi-target, and fuzzy target tracking. The actual machine frame rate is stable above 5Hz, end-to-end latency is about 180ms, and it can still perform following even after losing network connection.

The PhyAI inference framework increased the inference frame rate of MiniCPM-Robot on NVIDIA H20 from 10.12Hz to 36.77Hz; ModelBest has collaborated with Leju Robotics to develop exhibition hall navigation and park inspection solutions, and with Geely Auto on VLA models and production warehousing applications. PhyAI 推理框架使 MiniCPM-Robot 在英伟达 H20 上的推理帧率从 10.12Hz 提高到 36.77Hz；面壁已与乐聚机器人开发展厅导览和园区巡检方案，并与吉利汽车就 VLA 模型及生产仓储应用合作。

item.title: 商汤 SenseNova U1 Pro 发布，支持原生 8K 与长程编辑
item.guid: 商汤-SenseNova-U1-Pro-发布，支持原生-8K-与长程编辑
item.description:
SenseTime released the SenseNova U1 Pro preview version at WAIC 2026, integrating image-text understanding, generation, inspection, and correction into a single long-range loop, targeting delivery tasks such as commercial infographics, presentations, e-commerce visuals, scientific illustrations, and film storyboards. 商汤科技在 WAIC 2026 发布 SenseNova U1 Pro 预览版，把图文理解、生成、检查和修正放入同一个长程循环，面向商业信息图、演示文稿、电商视觉、科学图解和影视分镜等交付任务。

    Supports native 8K output, preserving text, lines, icons, and layout relationships for ultra-wide, ultra-long, and high-information-density screens;

    Supports dozens of rounds of Agentic Generation Loop, allowing simultaneous modification of overall style and local text;

    The underlying layer adopts the NEO-unify unified architecture, placing language and visual representations on the same foundation, and combining them with SenseTime's open-source SenseNova-Vision general visual capabilities.

The current preview version is by invitation only and will gradually open up as inference resources expand. The official version is planned for release in August this year. 目前预览版采用邀请测试，将随推理资源扩容逐步开放。正式版计划于今年 8 月上线。

item.title: 阿里云百炼上线 HappyOyster 1.0 世界模型
item.guid: 阿里云百炼上线-HappyOyster-1.0-世界模型
item.description:
Alibaba Cloud Bailian has launched the open-world model HappyOyster 1.0, initiating grayscale testing for enterprises and developers. Users can input a sentence or an image to generate a digital world that can be controlled and explored in real-time, and the model will predict subsequent environmental changes based on character actions and user commands. 阿里云百炼上线开放式世界模型 HappyOyster 1.0，面向企业和开发者开启灰测。用户可输入一句话或一张图生成可以实时控制和探索的数字世界，模型会根据角色动作与用户指令预测环境的后续变化。

    The World Exploration Adventure mode supports continuous subject actions and environmental interactions for over 1 minute, with synchronized audio and visual generation;

    Real-time Directing mode allows adjusting camera, characters, and plot with text commands, and pausing, rewriting, or rewinding at any time;

    The product provides Android, iOS, and Web SDKs; the server-side Open API manages the world state, and the client-side SDK encapsulates RTC connections, video rendering, and real-time interaction, with video export available after the experience.

item.title: 大晓机器人推出具身世界模型 Kairos 3.1
item.guid: 大晓机器人推出具身世界模型-Kairos-3.1
item.description:
On July 19, Daxiao Robot unveiled Kairos 3.1, a native action-integrated enlightened world model, at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference, making it open source to the entire industry. 7 月 19 日，大晓机器人在 2026 世界人工智能大会上发布原生行动一体化开悟世界模型 Kairos 3.1，并面向全行业开源。

Officially, the model adopts a unified architecture, integrating world understanding, physical generation, and action prediction into a single latent space, forming a closed loop of "understanding—inference—execution—reflection." 官方称，该模型采用统一架构，将世界理解、物理生成和动作预测融合至同一隐空间，形成「理解—推演—执行—反思」的闭环。

Daxiao Robot also released its inference engine, KairosRT. Official data shows that on the NVIDIA Jetson Thor platform with BF16 precision, the Kairos 3.1 8B model has an average inference delay of 125 milliseconds; compared to Cosmos 3 Nano's 6486 milliseconds, inference efficiency is improved by 52 times. 大晓机器人还发布了推理引擎 KairosRT。官方数据显示，在英伟达 Jetson Thor 平台、BF16 精度下，Kairos 3.1 8B 模型平均推理延迟为 125 毫秒；相较 Cosmos 3 Nano 的 6486 毫秒，推理效率提升 52 倍。

item.title: 京东发布 JoyAI 实时语音交互与视频编辑模型
item.guid: 京东发布-JoyAI-实时语音交互与视频编辑模型
item.description:
At WAIC 2026, JD.com released the JoyAI-Talker real-time voice interaction model and the JoyAI-Video-Edit real-time video editing model, complementing its multimodal model matrix for the physical world. 京东在 WAIC 2026 发布 JoyAI-Talker 实时语音交互模型和 JoyAI-Video-Edit 实时视频编辑模型，补充其面向物理世界的多模态模型矩阵。

    JoyAI-Talker supports low-latency dialogue, emotion understanding, tool invocation, and memory, and can identify user identities through voiceprint recognition and understand dialogue intent by combining environmental data.

    JoyAI-Video-Edit supports modifying videos while previewing; users can add or delete objects, replace characters, transfer clothing, or reconstruct scenes using natural language.

    JD.com simultaneously open-sourced the human first-person perspective dataset EgoLive and provided a JoyEgoCam collection experience in the exhibition area.

Since the beginning of this year, JD.com has released 7 foundational models, including Joy-Image-Edit, JoyAI-Echo, and JoyAI-VL-Interaction, covering speech, image, video, real-time interaction, world models, and embodied intelligence. 京东今年以来已发布 Joy-Image-Edit、JoyAI-Echo 和 JoyAI-VL-Interaction 等 7 个基础模型，覆盖语音、图像、视频、实时交互、世界模型与具身智能。

item.title: 小红书上线 RED Skill、内测 Vibe Coding 小工具
item.guid: 小红书上线-RED-Skill、内测-Vibe-Coding-小工具
item.description:
Xiaohongshu announced at WAIC 2026 the full launch of RED Skill, the internal testing of the Vibe Coding gadget, and the upgrade of its creator service platform, Builder Hub. Developers can upload and attach AI Skill and Vibe Coding creations to notes, and users can download, experience, and provide feedback within the notes. 小红书在 WAIC 2026 宣布全量上线 RED Skill、内测 Vibe Coding 小工具，并升级创作服务平台 Builder Hub。开发者可以把 AI Skill 和 Vibe Coding 作品上传并挂载到笔记，用户可在笔记内下载、体验和反馈。

Official data shows that within one month of internal testing, RED Skill generated over 7300 original Skills, covering areas such as efficiency tools, career coaching, and emotional companionship; among them, the PPT generation Skill developed by AI creator "Guizang" has accumulated nearly 4700 user experiences. 官方数据显示，RED Skill 内测一个月产生超过 7300 个原创 Skill，覆盖提效工具、职场辅导和情感陪伴等方向；其中 AI 创作者「歸藏」开发的 PPT 生成 Skill 累计获得近 4700 人体验。

Over the past year, Xiaohongshu has seen more than 160,000 active AI developers, with 40,000 to 50,000 Vibe Coding creations published monthly since February. 过去一年，小红书有超过 16 万名 AI 开发者活跃，2 月以来每月发布 4 万至 5 万个 Vibe Coding 作品。

item.title: 滴滴回应「她计划」传言：订单不减司机收入，女司机自愿加入
item.guid: 滴滴回应「她计划」传言：订单不减司机收入，女司机自愿加入
item.description:
Recently, Didi Chuxing responded to online rumors about its "She Plan," stating that after passengers use the "optional female driver" feature, fares and driver income will still be calculated according to the platform's existing billing rules, and there will be no deduction of driver earnings or differentiated pricing for such orders. 日前，滴滴出行回应关于「她计划」的网络传言称，乘客使用「可选女司机」功能后，车费与司机收入仍按平台现有计费规则计算，不会针对这类订单扣减司机收益或区别计价。

Female drivers can freely choose to join or leave the "She Plan," and the order refusal management rules are consistent with other drivers on the platform. Didi states that this feature is intended for scenarios such as physical discomfort, late-night overtime, and remote residences, helping female passengers in need to be more accurately matched with female drivers. 女司机可以自主选择加入或退出「她计划」，拒单管理规则与平台其他司机一致。滴滴称，该功能用于身体不适、深夜加班和住所偏远等场景，帮助有需求的女乘客更精准地匹配女司机。

This product was originally named "Female Friendly Plan" and was renamed "She Plan" in May this year. Survey data provided by Didi shows that female drivers using this feature have a 12% higher satisfaction rate and a 14% increase in sense of security compared to the overall platform. 这项产品原名「女性友好计划」，今年 5 月更名为「她计划」。滴滴提供的调研数据显示，使用该功能的女司机满意度较平台整体高 12%，安全感提升 14%。

item.title: 遏制黄牛炒卖，宝可梦卡牌购买将要求身份验证
item.guid: 遏制黄牛炒卖，宝可梦卡牌购买将要求身份验证
item.description:
According to NOWRE, to curb the escalating speculation in the Pokémon Trading Card Game in recent years, The Pokémon Company in Japan announced that it will introduce an identity verification system for sales of certain Pokémon Center Online products starting in August. Consumers purchasing designated card products will need to complete verification through the official digital identity authentication app. 据 NOWRE 报道，为遏制近年来持续升温的 Pokémon Trading Card Game 炒卖现象，日本宝可梦公司宣布，将从 8 月起在部分 Pokémon Center Online 商品销售中引入身份认证系统。消费者购买指定卡牌商品时，需要通过官方数字身份认证 App 完成验证。

Officials can use identity information to identify unusually large purchase behaviors, thereby reducing the possibility of popular cards being hoarded. This policy announcement comes as the Pokémon Trading Card Game is about to celebrate its 30th-anniversary cards. 官方可借助身份信息识别异常的大量购买行为，以降低热门卡牌被集中囤货的可能。此次政策公布之际，Pokémon Trading Card Game 即将迎来 30 周年纪念卡牌。

item.title: 2026 年度中国电影总票房突破 200 亿元
item.guid: 2026-年度中国电影总票房突破-200-亿元
item.description:
As of the afternoon of July 19, China's total box office for 2026 (including pre-sales) has exceeded 20 billion yuan. According to Maoyan Pro data, around 15:04 on July 19, the national real-time comprehensive box office was approximately 210 million yuan, with a total of 5.974 million tickets sold and 464,000 screenings. 截至 7 月 19 日下午，2026 年度中国电影总票房（含预售）已突破 200 亿元。猫眼专业版数据显示，7 月 19 日 15:04 左右，全国实时电影大盘综合票房约为 2.10 亿元，总出票 597.4 万张、总场次 46.4 万场。

In the daily box office rankings, "Kung Fu Girl Soccer" temporarily ranked first with approximately 104 million yuan, accounting for 49.3% of the box office; "Eight Immortals!" ranked second with approximately 63 million yuan; and "Missing You" ranked third with approximately 16.4 million yuan. 当日票房排名中，《功夫女足》以约 1.04 亿元暂列第一，票房占比 49.3%；《八仙！》以约 6300 万元排名第二；《想你了》以约 1640 万元排名第三。

item.title: 《八仙！》豆瓣开分 8.3，暂列 2026 暑期档新片第一
item.guid: 《八仙！》豆瓣开分-8.3，暂列-2026-暑期档新片第一
item.description:
The domestic animated comedy film "The Eight Immortals!" was released on July 18th and scored 8.3 on Douban, temporarily ranking first among new films in the 2026 summer season. The film currently has 98,811 reviews, with 5-star ratings accounting for 39.4% and 4-star ratings for 42.4%. 国产喜剧动画电影《八仙！》于 7 月 18 日上映并在豆瓣开分 8.3，暂列 2026 年暑期档新片第一。影片目前有 98811 人评价，其中 5 星占比 39.4%，4 星占比 42.4%。

Inspired by the traditional folk tale "The Eight Immortals Crossing the Sea," "The Eight Immortals!" tells the story of eight mortals with diverse identities—Lu Dongbin, Zhong Liquan, He Xiangu, Tie Guaili, Han Xiangzi, Cao Guojiu, Lan Caihe, and Zhang Guolao—who gather in Penglai Wonderland due to different circumstances. 《八仙！》以传统民间故事「八仙过海」为灵感，讲述吕洞宾、钟离权、何仙姑、铁拐李、韩湘子、曹国舅、蓝采和与张果老等八个身份各异的凡人，因为不同机缘聚集到蓬莱仙境。

They impersonate immortals, manage a Taoist temple, and "grant every wish" for the common people, while simultaneously getting entangled in a conspiracy related to Penglai. The film was originally scheduled for release on July 24th but was later moved up to July 18th. 他们假扮神仙、经营道观，为百姓「有求必应」，同时卷入一场与蓬莱相关的阴谋。影片原定于 7 月 24 日上映，随后提档至 7 月 18 日。
